CARD FILLS THE ENTIRE IMAGE FRAME. NO EXTERNAL SCENERY OR TABLE SURFACE.  UI DESIGN: TOP-LEFT CORNER DISPLAYS LARGE '99' RATING NUMBER ONLY (NO 'OVR' TEXT), RENDERED IN GLOWING GOLDEN DRAGON BALL NUMERALS WITH CRACKLING KI SPARKS AND AURA IN ALL CAPS MATCHING THE EMERALD NAMEK GREEN AND SOLAR GOLD FRAME COLOR, POSITION LABEL 'LW/RW' BELOW IN BOLD ANIME MANGA TYPOGRAPHY WITH SHARP SPIKY EDGES AND KI ENERGY AURA IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS ALSO IN EMERALD NAMEK GREEN AND SOLAR GOLD. LEFT EDGE OF CARD DISPLAYS MINIATURE GOLDEN DRAGON BALL WITH 7 STARS ON LEFT EDGE AT MID-HEIGHT CENTER, ONE THIRD THE SIZE, SUBTLE KI GLOW. SIDE LOGO PLACEMENT IS FIXED: ON THE LEFT OUTER EDGE, EXACTLY AT MID-HEIGHT (50 PERCENT OF CARD HEIGHT), SAME POSITION ON EVERY CARD. BOTTOM PANEL DISPLAYS CHARACTER NAME 'SHENRON' IN LARGE BOLD ANIME MANGA TYPOGRAPHY WITH SHARP SPIKY EDGES AND KI ENERGY AURA IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS COLORED EMERALD NAMEK GREEN AND SOLAR GOLD ABOVE 6 STAT BOXES (PAC, SHO, PAS, DRI, DEF, PHY) WITH VALUES, STATS MUST ALWAYS BE EXACTLY SIX ATTRIBUTES (PAC, SHO, PAS, DRI, DEF, PHY) ARRANGED IN A STRICT 3 COLUMNS BY 2 ROWS GRID. ALL TEXT IN BOLD ANIME MANGA TYPOGRAPHY WITH SHARP SPIKY EDGES AND KI ENERGY AURA IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS COLORED EMERALD NAMEK GREEN AND SOLAR GOLD TO MATCH FRAME THEME. NO ADDITIONAL ITEMS OR OBJECTS AT BOTTOM OF CARD, CLEAN DESIGN.
